/usr/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  --generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/main_app.dir/main.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/main_app.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11  libtiny_llm_core.a -lcuda libkernels.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl -lstdc++ -lm -lgcc_s -lgcc -lc  -L"/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu"
